title: Multimarket Contact in the Hospital Industry

construct_vars: df <- df %>% dplyr::left_join(gvar_tbl, by='h') %>% dplyr::mutate(gvar_CS = ifelse(!is.na(first_post), as.numeric(first_post), 0))

notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. All 5 estimators converge. Stable positive effect ~0.05-0.07. Slight pre-trend drift at h=-4. Schmitt (2018). Stata: areg lnprnonmed post lncmi pctmcaid lnbeds fp hhi sysoth i.year [aw=dis_tot], absorb(h) cluster(h) if indirect==0. Staggered adoption: different hospitals treated in different years (2000-2010). 347 treated, 3032 never-treated. Outcome = log non-medical hospital prices. SENSITIVITY: CS-NT+fp+sysoth (binary dummies) improves pre-trends relative to unconditional CS-NT — use in discussion chapter to illustrate when controls help.
